title: Impact-driven resume bullets
text: Write bullet points with strong action verbs, quantified outcomes, and concrete scope. Prefer 'Reduced processing time by 35% by redesigning the ingestion pipeline' over vague responsibility statements.

title: Align resume to target job description
text: Mirror the target job description's core skills and responsibilities in the summary, skills section, and top experience bullets. Only include keywords that are supported by real experience.

title: Strong engineering resume pattern
text: A strong software engineering resume emphasizes delivered systems, measurable impact, scale, ownership, and technical decision-making. Lead with recent achievements and keep each bullet specific and evidence-based.
